---
title: "Data by Derek"
include-in-header:
  - text: |
     <link rel = "shortcut icon" href = "assets/favicon.ico" />
about:
  id: hero-heading
  template: trestles
  image: assets/headshot.jpg
  links:
    - icon: kanban
      text: Projects
      href: projects.qmd
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/derekgrodgers/
    - icon: github
      text: GitHub
      href: https://github.com/derekrodgers
format:
  html:
    theme:
      dark: darkly
    css: styles.css
    toc: false
---

Hi, I'm Derek!

I'm a data scientist and analytics professional with 6+ years in SaaS and science.

Most recently, I was creating [interactive dashboards](https://www.salussafety.io/reporting){target="_blank"} for the construction industry. In 2025, I graduated with a [Master of Data Science](https://masterdatascience.ubc.ca/){target="_blank"} from [UBC](https://www.ubc.ca/).

## Experience

SALUS | Data Analyst | Jan 2024 - Aug 2024

MotionHall | Director of Quality, Analytics | Sept 2017 - Feb 2023

## Education

University of British Columbia | Vancouver, BC

- Master of Data Science | Sept 2024 - June 2025

Dalhousie University | Halifax, NS

- B.Sc. (Hons), Neuroscience | Sept 2014 - June 2017
